title: Meeting Again
prompt: Write a short paragraph about meeting someone again unexpectedly.
hint: Describe the feelings and the situation of meeting someone by chance.
sample: I felt like I would definitely meet you again in this place. Hearing the same song on the street made me think of you.
ja: 이곳에서 꼭 다시 만날 것 같아
local: 이곳에서 꼭 다시 만날 것 같아
local_pron: Igoseseo kkok dasi mannal geot gata
ko: 이곳에서 꼭 다시 만날 것 같아
ko_pron: Igoseseo kkok dasi mannal geot gata

title: Looking Back
prompt: Describe a moment when you looked back because you thought it was someone you know.
hint: Explain why you kept turning around and what you felt.
sample: I looked back once more because I thought it was you. I kept turning around, hoping to see you.

title: Shared Memories
prompt: Write about a song you used to listen to together and how it reminds you of that time.
hint: Mention the feelings the song brings and any memories it triggers.
sample: The song we used to listen to long ago suddenly played on the street, reminding me of those days.
ja: 오래 전에 함께 듣던 노래가 거리에서 내게 우연히 들려온 것처럼
local: 오래 전에 함께 듣던 노래가 거리에서 내게 우연히 들려온 것처럼
local_pron: Orae jeone hamkke deutdeon noraega georieseo naege uyeonhi deullyeoon geotcheoreom
ko: 오래 전에 함께 듣던 노래가 거리에서 내게 우연히 들려온 것처럼
ko_pron: Orae jeone hamkke deutdeon noraega georieseo naege uyeonhi deullyeoon geotcheoreom

title: Love and Hope
prompt: Express your hope to meet someone again and how you feel about your love remaining the same.
hint: Talk about the unchanged feelings and the anticipation of meeting again.
sample: I feel like we will meet again by chance, and my love for you remains just as it was.
ja: 살아가다 한 번쯤 우연히 만날 것 같아 사랑했던 그 모습 그대로
local: 살아가다 한 번쯤 우연히 만날 것 같아 사랑했던 그 모습 그대로
local_pron: Saraganda han beonjjum uyeonhi mannal geot gata saranghaetdeon geu moseup geudaero
ko: 살아가다 한 번쯤 우연히 만날 것 같아 사랑했던 그 모습 그대로
ko_pron: Saraganda han beonjjum uyeonhi mannal geot gata saranghaetdeon geu moseup geudaero

title: Never Letting Go
prompt: Write a promise to never lose someone again.
hint: Express your determination and feelings about holding on to love.
sample: I will never let you go again.
